examples: These are the first machines that can stand the wear and tear of continuously crushing glass.
Use this knife to chop, slice and mince; the side of the blade can be used for crushing garlic and some spices.
The avalanche forced its way down the mountain, crushing everything in its path.
The crushing floodwaters killed at least twelve hundred people, some right here on these streets.
But there is no similar escape from the crushing future burden of government debt.
